user.title: Neviweb130: Sinope Zigbee and Wi-Fi devices control
user.description:
Enter your Neviweb credentials and options: login (email), password, locations (use fields location, location 2 and location 3 if you have multiple locations, or leave all 3 empty to auto-detect), (set to _ to block detection), scan_interval, homekit_support, stat_interval, notifications and safe_mode.
(* = required), Click on button ? for help and documentation.

data.prefix: Neviweb account name, optional for first account.
data.network: Optional, First Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.network2: Optional, Second Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.network3: Optional, Third Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.scan_interval: Optional, Neviweb polling interval, 300 to 600 sec.
data.stat_interval: Optional, Devices energy statistic polling interval, 300 to 1800 sec.
data.notify: Optional, Get notification in case of device error.
data.safe_mode: Optional, Put device ID to update in safe mode or '-'.

reconfigure.title: Neviweb130: reconfigure options
reconfigure.description:
Update your Neviweb credentials and options: login (email), password, locations (use fields location, location 2 and location 3 if you have multiple locations, or leave all 3 empty to auto-detect), (set to _ to block detection), scan_interval, homekit_support, stat_interval, notifications and safe_mode.
(* = required), Click on button ? for help and documentation.

data.prefix: Neviweb account name, required for all accounts, set to default for first one.
data.network: Optional, First Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.network2: Optional, Second Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.network3: Optional, Third Neviweb location name or '_' or nothing for auto detection.
data.scan_interval: Optional, Neviweb polling interval, 300 to 600 sec.
data.stat_interval: Optional, Devices energy statistic polling interval, 300 to 1800 sec.
data.notify: Optional, Get notification in case of device error.
data.safe_mode: Optional, Put device ID to update in safe mode or '-'.

abort.already_configured_for_this_user: A configuration already exist for this Neviweb user.
abort.Max_three_instances_allowed: You cannot add more than three instances of this integration.

error.cannot_connect: Test connection to Neviweb failed, check user and password.
error.bad_network_name: Network name can't contain accented characters.
error.not_a_directory: This path {folder} is not a folder.
error.login_submit_failed: Cannot submit login form... Check your network or firewall.
error.too_many_sessions:
Too many active sessions ({count}).
Close all Neviweb sessions opened on other platforms.
If the error persists, disable this integration (or stop Home Assistant), wait a few minutes, then re-enable it (or restart Home Assistant).
error.bad_credentials: Invalid Neviweb username and/or password. Check your configuration parameters. Error code: {code}.
error.unknown_login_error: Unknown error while logging to Neviweb. Error code: {code}.
error.account_id_empty: Account ID is empty, check your username and password to log into Neviweb...
error.no_gateway_defined:
All Gateway ID are None.
Network selection failed. Check that your configuration network names match one of the networks in your Neviweb account.
Available networks were logged during network selection. Check your log.
error.heat_cool_warning: Warning: Service {code} is only for TH6500WF or TH6250WF thermostats.
error.entities_not_ready: Entities not finished loading, try again shortly.
error.does_not_support: Entity {entity} is {domain} {model} thermostat and does not support time format.
error.must_be_heat_cool: Entity {entity} must be a {domain} heat-cool thermostat.
error.fan_model_not_supported: Fan speed is not supported for model {model}.
error.fan_mode_not_supported: Fan mode {mode} is not supported for model {model}.
error.invalid_lock_value: Lock value {lock} is not supported for model {model}.
error.no_off_value: Entity {entity} does not support value off.
error.multiple_heating_level: Entity {entity} does not support multiple levels of heating with current configuration.
error.multiple_cooling_level: Entity {entity} does not support multiple levels of cooling with current configuration.
error.integer_needed: Invalid value for {param}, must be an integer.
error.float_needed: Invalid value for {param}, must be a float.
error.missing_functionality: Entity {entity} does not have both a heat pump and an auxiliary heater.
error.invalid_value: Invalid value for {param}, must be one of {value}.
error.cannot_use_entity: Entity {entity} cannot be used with this service (action).
error.scan_interval_error: Invalid scan interval format. Use seconds or HH:MM:SS.
error.update_stopped:
Warning: Received message from Neviweb, device disconnected... Check your log...
Neviweb update will be halted for 20 minutes for {name}, id: {id}, Sku: {sku}.
error.update_restarted: Warning: Neviweb Device update restarted for {name}, Sku: {sku}.
error.usr_session:
Warning: Got USRSESSEXP error, Neviweb session expired.
Set your scan_interval parameter to less than 10 minutes to avoid this...
Reconnecting...
error.maintenance: Warning: Neviweb access temporary blocked for maintenance... Retry later.
error.access_limit: Warning: ACCSESSEXC, maximum Neviweb session number reached... Close other connections and try again.
error.error_code: Warning: Neviweb Device error code detected: {code} for device: {name}, ID: {id}, Sku: {sku}. {message}.
error.temp_error: Warning: Neviweb Device temperature error code detected: {error} for device: {name}, ID: {id}, Sku: {sku}.
error.emergency_heat_error: Warning: Cannot activate BOOST (emergency heat) due to device configuration. Condition not met for {name}, Sku: {sku}.
error.ignore_miwi:
The Neviweb location selected for parameter {param} contains unsupported MiWi devices.
If this location contains only MiWi devices, use the sinope neviweb integration instead.
If mixed devices exist, set ignore_miwi: True in your neviweb130 configuration.
error.location_status: Session expired while fetching Neviweb status for location {param}. Set scan_interval < 10 minutes to avoid session expiration.
error.device_alert: Cannot get device alert for device {id}.
error.weather_data: Cannot get Neviweb weather and icon for code {code}.
error.neviweb_status: Cannot post Neviweb status for location {location} with data {data}.
error.no_stat: Got None for device {param} stats for device {name}.
error.gauge_disconnected: Warning: Tank monitor gauge disconnected: for device: {name} id: {id}, Sku: {sku}.
error.request_count: Warning: {count} requests today. Safety limit: {limit}, Daily limit: 30000.
error.unknown_error: Unknown error for {name} (id: {id}) (SKU: {sku}), (Model: {model}). Report to maintainer. Data received: {data}.
error.daily_access: Maximum daily request reached... Increase interval polling frequency on Neviweb, (scan_interval).
error.update_message: Update to version {version} was installed successfully.
error.update_rejected:
Update to version {version} failed.
A rollback was performed and the old version was restored.
{message}.
error.rollback_skip:
Update to version {version} failed.
Rollback skipped, no local backup available.
{message}.
error.update_fail: Rollback could not be completed. Manual intervention required.
error.error_resolved: All errors resolved for device {name}, ID: {id}, Sku: {sku}.
error.safe_mode_enabled: Auto-enabling safe mode for device {name} (id: {id}) due to unsupported attribute.
error.neviweb130_migrated:
Neviweb130 device's unique_id have been migrated from integer values to string values.
More details in log.
error.neviweb130_log_ready: Download log file: click here. File will be deleted after 30 minutes.
error.configuration_reloaded: Configuration have been updated and neviweb130 restarted successfully.
error.weather_icons_folder_missing: The directory /local/neviweb130/weather is missing. Weather icons png files won't be displayed. Read documentation for help.
error.weather_icons_folder_empty: The directory /local/neviweb130/weather is empty. No weather icon will be displayed. Read documentation for help.

options.title: Neviweb130 Management
options.description:
Configure each option of Neviweb130 according to your needs.
Click on button ? for help and documentation.

error.non_ascii_prefix: Prefix must contain only ASCII characters.
error.duplicate_prefix: This prefix is already used by another Neviweb account.

set_climate_keypad_lock.name: Set climate keypad lock
set_climate_keypad_lock.description: Lock or unlock Zigbee climate device keypad.

set_light_keypad_lock.name: Set light keypad lock
set_light_keypad_lock.description: Lock or unlock light device keypad.

set_switch_keypad_lock.name: Set switch keypad lock
set_switch_keypad_lock.description: Lock or unlock switch device keypad.

set_switch_timer2.name: Set switch timer 2
set_switch_timer2.description: Set secondary timer for multi-controller switch.

set_switch_power_timer.name: Set switch power timer
set_switch_power_timer.description: Set timer for RM3250ZB power switch.

set_switch_temp_alert.name: Set switch temperature alert
set_switch_temp_alert.description: Configure low temperature alert for MC3100ZB switch.

set_led_indicator.name: Set LED indicator color
set_led_indicator.description: Configure LED indicator color for light device.

set_led_on_intensity.name: Set LED on intensity
set_led_on_intensity.description: Configure LED intensity when light is on.

set_led_off_intensity.name: Set LED off intensity
set_led_off_intensity.description: Configure LED intensity when light is off.

set_wattage.name: Set wattage override
set_wattage.description: Configure wattage override for light or dimmer.

set_floor_air_limit.name: Set floor air limit
set_floor_air_limit.description: Configure floor thermostat air temperature limit.

set_sensor_batt_alert.name: Set sensor battery alert
set_sensor_batt_alert.description: Enable or disable battery alert for leak sensor.

set_sensor_closure_action.name: Set sensor closure action
set_sensor_closure_action.description: Configure closure action for leak sensor.

set_sensor_leak_alert.name: Set leak alert
set_sensor_leak_alert.description: Enable or disable leak alert for sensor.

set_sensor_temp_alert.name: Set temperature alert
set_sensor_temp_alert.description: Enable or disable low temperature alert for sensor.

set_valve_alert.name: Set valve battery alert
set_valve_alert.description: Enable or disable battery alert for valve.

set_valve_temp_alert.name: Set valve temperature alert
set_valve_temp_alert.description: Enable or disable temperature alert for valve.

set_early_start.name: Set early start
set_early_start.description: Enable or disable early heating start.

set_hvac_dr_options.name: Set HVAC DR options
set_hvac_dr_options.description: Configure demand response options for thermostats.

set_load_dr_options.name: Set load DR options
set_load_dr_options.description: Configure demand response options for load controller.

set_controlled_device.name: Set controlled device
set_controlled_device.description: Configure device type controlled by RM3250ZB.

set_flow_meter_model.name: Set flow meter model
set_flow_meter_model.description: Configure flow meter model and protection.

set_input_output_names.name: Set I/O names
set_input_output_names.description: Configure names for MC3100ZB inputs and outputs.

set_key_double_up.name: Set double-up key action
set_key_double_up.description: Enable or disable double-up key press.

set_on_off_input_delay.name: Set input delay
set_on_off_input_delay.description: Configure on/off delay for MC3100ZB inputs.

set_heat_pump_operation_limit.name: Set heat pump operation limit
set_heat_pump_operation_limit.description: Configure low temperature limit for heat pump.

set_display_config.name: Set display config
set_display_config.description: Enable or disable heat pump display.

set_sound_config.name: Set sound config
set_sound_config.description: Enable or disable heat pump sound.

set_reversing_valve_polarity.name: Set reversing valve polarity
set_reversing_valve_polarity.description: Configure heat pump reversing valve polarity.

set_min_time_on.name: Set minimum ON time
set_min_time_on.description: Configure minimum ON duration for thermostat stages.

set_min_time_off.name: Set minimum OFF time
set_min_time_off.description: Configure minimum OFF duration for thermostat stages.

set_heat_interstage_delay.name: Set heat interstage delay
set_heat_interstage_delay.description: Configure delay before increasing heating stage.

set_cool_interstage_delay.name: Set cool interstage delay
set_cool_interstage_delay.description: Configure delay before increasing cooling stage.

set_heatcool_setpoint_delta.name: Set heat/cool delta
set_heatcool_setpoint_delta.description: Configure delta between heating and cooling setpoints.

dangerous_attribute_change.title: Risky attribute change
